title: ASCII Sequence Rect And ParOver Blocks
problem: The ASCII sequence renderer still rejects Mermaid rect and par_over control blocks even though merman-core parses them as endpoint-less control signals.

evidence.result: opened the ASCII sequence rect/par_over follow-on lane and selected boundary/inventory tests as the first executable task
added boundary tests proving rect line types 22/23 and par_over line types 32/21 while both remain explicit control messages diagnostics
implemented rect style-labeled single-section frames in ASCII and Unicode while keeping par_over deferred

continue_policy.notes: Implement par_over as a single-section frame with explicit asymmetric start/end matching.
